items.docs: Blacksmith does not publish a documented public REST API. It is integrated as a GitHub App and used via GitHub Actions runner tags (runs-on) and useblacksmith/* Actions. Install the app for your organization, then swap your runs-on tag to a Blacksmith runner label (e.g. blacksmith-2vcpu-ubuntu-2404).
Dispatches a testbox and returns an ID immediately. Required before any run command. Flags: --idle-timeout, --job, --ref, --ssh-public-key.
Syncs local changes (rsync --delete --checksum) and executes a command on the testbox, blocking until ready. Flags: --id, --debug, --ssh-private-key. Exits with the remote command's exit code.
Shows the current status of a testbox. Supports --wait to block until the testbox is ready.
CI analytics, run history, logs, metrics, monitors, test analytics, and SSH access live in the dashboard at app.blacksmith.sh. Not a REST API.
